brief: One chapter of the Perfect Day — a group of real experiences that genuinely belong together in the day.

brief.description: A two-or-three word chapter label in CAPITALS, prefixed with '// ' — like '// THE EVENING' or '// AFTER DARK' — in the guest's language, never a category code.
The chapter named as a promise — what this part of the day gives the guest, not a category heading. Plain text only — never markdown.
ONE sentence tying this chapter's experiences together, grounded in what they actually are. Plain text only — never markdown.

The single most striking image among THIS chapter's experiences — a real content image that sets the chapter's mood, never stock, never invented. Must be a DIRECT IMAGE FILE URL — a photo ending .jpg/.jpeg/.png/.webp (often on static.myconnect.ae) taken verbatim from a search result — NEVER a webpage URL (yasisland.com/en/... pages are not images and render broken).
The experiences of this chapter — each is exactly ONE real content item from the search results, never invented, each appearing in only one chapter across the whole day.
